raw_consumer_statement: We are in the middle of a huge Identity Theft, Fraud, and Financial Exploitation case. We have contacted numerous credit cards companies to resolve these issues that have been properly reported with all departments. The are either never available to discuss the fraudulent charges, or do not communicate with us directly if they have a question. XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX actually was dealing with a blocked number, and the phone number of the individual that we have our case against and they were removing charges off of my card. XXXXXXXX XXXXy refuses to send statements, but keeps trying to put me in collection. XXXX XXXX negatively impacted our credit scores by claiming they ran a credit check and took my available credit from {$13000.00} to {$250.00} with overdrafted my account. When did the victims become the ones that aren't being helped? Our credit scores have gone from the mid to XXXX XXXX 's to low XXXX 's in a couple of months. I don't know what to do with the credit card companies. They never ran a credit check. XXXX froze our socials. You can't pull that information, so why lie or do something to cause more harm to the victim in all of this. I am at a loss. The credit card companies are killing our credit score, and none of this is our fault. Any Assistance would be greatly appreciated.
